cards.dark_classes: bg-slate-800/50 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-lg rounded-xl

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-medium rounded-lg px-4 py-2 shadow-sm transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200 text-slate-900 dark:bg-slate-800 dark:hover:bg-slate-700 dark:text-white font-medium rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-slate-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-800 text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400 transition-colors rounded-lg px-3 py-2
buttons.danger: bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white font-medium rounded-lg px-4 py-2 shadow-sm transition-colors

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

kanban.column: bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-900/50 rounded-xl p-4 min-w-[300px] flex flex-col gap-3 h-full border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800
kanban.card: bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 p-4 rounded-lg shadow-sm border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 hover:shadow-md cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing transition-all

universal_guidelines: Use 'Manrope' for all headings to give a modern, technical feel.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all financial data, prices, and IDs.
Implement a 'Density Toggle' if possible, but default to 'High Density' for the dashboard.
Kanban boards must scroll horizontally. Columns should be fixed width (min 300px).
Use 'Sonner' for all notifications (success, error, info).
All interactive elements must have a `data-testid`.
Do not use generic 'gray' backgrounds; always tint them with a hint of blue (slate).
For Arabic support, ensure layouts use `flex-start` / `flex-end` logic or `rtl` variants where necessary (though Tailwind handles most automatically with `dir='rtl'`).
Avoid full-screen gradients. Use subtle noise textures or mesh gradients in specific areas (like the sidebar or hero cards).
anti_patterns: Do not use pure black (#000000) or pure gray (#808080).
Do not center text in data tables; align left for text, right for numbers.
Do not use 'rounded-full' for main buttons; use 'rounded-lg' or 'rounded-md' for a more corporate feel.
Avoid 'Rainbow' dashboards. Stick to the strict color palette (Blue/Slate/Emerald/Rose).
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-performance ERP. Focus on speed, data density, and clarity. The 'Dark Mode' is the primary experience for traders/mentors. The 'Light Mode' is for Finance/HR. Ensure the 'Sidebar' is collapsible. Use Recharts for all data visualization. Use 'react-beautiful-dnd' or '@hello-pangea/dnd' for the Kanban board if drag-and-drop is required, otherwise simple lists. Prioritize the 'Sales CRM' and 'Finance' modules as per Phase 1.
